description_long: This is a classic round frying pan with a deep, slightly sloped cooking surface and a long, straight handle extending from one side. The pan appears to be made of cast iron or a similar heavy-duty metal, giving it a matte black finish with a subtle texture. The handle is solid, matching the pan's material, and features a small hole at the end for hanging. The rim of the pan is thick and straight, without any visible pouring spouts or flared edges. The bottom of the pan is flat and smooth, lacking any visible brand markings or decorative patterns. Overall, the pan is utilitarian and robust, suitable for both indoor and outdoor urban cooking scenarios.
description: A sturdy, matte black frying pan with a straight handle and a thick, straight rim. The pan is made of heavy metal and features a hanging hole at the end of the handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the round, deep pan body and the full length of the straight handle.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the circular opening of the pan and the handle extending directly toward the viewer.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, showing the handle and the pan's depth from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view focusing on the back of the handle and the pan's circular rim.
attribute_handle_type: Single, straight, solid metal handle with a rounded end and a hanging hole; no visible grip texture or covering.
attribute_rim_design: Thick, straight rim with no flaring, pouring spouts, or reinforced edges; utilitarian and robust.
attribute_bottom_pattern: Smooth, flat bottom with no visible patterns, ridges, or brand markings.
